pred.sql:
SELECT region_name, product_name, revenue
FROM (
  SELECT
    region_id,
    region_name,
    product_name,
    revenue,
    RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY region_id ORDER BY revenue DESC) AS rk
  FROM (
    SELECT
      r.id AS region_id,
      r.name AS region_name,
      p.name AS product_name,
      SUM(o.quantity * p.price) AS revenue
    FROM regions r
    JOIN customers c ON c.region_id = r.id
    JOIN orders o ON o.customer_id = c.id
    JOIN products p ON p.id = o.product_id
    GROUP BY r.id, r.name, p.id, p.name
  ) AS revenue_by_product
) AS ranked
WHERE rk = 1
ORDER BY region_name, product_name

SELECT c.name
FROM customers AS c
JOIN orders AS o ON o.customer_id = c.id
GROUP BY c.id, c.name
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT strftime('%Y-%m', o.order_date)) >= 4

SELECT p.name
FROM products AS p
JOIN orders AS o ON o.product_id = p.id
GROUP BY p.id, p.name
HAVING SUM(o.quantity * p.price) > (
  SELECT AVG(product_revenue)
  FROM (
    SELECT SUM(o2.quantity * p2.price) AS product_revenue
    FROM orders AS o2
    JOIN products AS p2 ON p2.id = o2.product_id
    GROUP BY o2.product_id
  ) AS t
)

SELECT
  p.category,
  COALESCE(
    ROUND(
      100.0 * COALESCE(SUM(o.quantity * p.price), 0) /
      NULLIF(
        (SELECT SUM(o2.quantity * p2.price)
         FROM orders o2
         JOIN products p2 ON o2.product_id = p2.id),
        0
      ),
      1
    ),
    0.0
  ) AS percentage
FROM products p
LEFT JOIN orders o ON o.product_id = p.id
GROUP BY p.category
ORDER BY p.category

SELECT c.name
FROM customers AS c
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1
  FROM orders AS o
  JOIN products AS p ON p.id = o.product_id
  WHERE o.customer_id = c.id
    AND p.category = 'Electronics'
)

SELECT category, name AS product_name
FROM (
  SELECT category, name, DENSE_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY category ORDER BY price DESC) AS price_rank
  FROM products
)
WHERE price_rank = 2

SELECT r.name, ROUND(AVG(o.quantity * p.price), 2) AS avg_order_value
FROM orders o
JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.id
JOIN regions r ON c.region_id = r.id
JOIN products p ON o.product_id = p.id
GROUP BY r.id, r.name
ORDER BY AVG(o.quantity * p.price) DESC
LIMIT 1

SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', o.order_date) AS month, SUM(o.quantity * p.price) AS total_revenue
FROM orders AS o
JOIN products AS p ON o.product_id = p.id
GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m', o.order_date)
ORDER BY month

SELECT p.name
FROM orders o
JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.id
JOIN products p ON o.product_id = p.id
GROUP BY p.id, p.name
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT c.region_id) > 1

SELECT c.name, SUM(o.quantity * p.price) AS total_spend
FROM customers AS c
JOIN orders AS o ON o.customer_id = c.id
JOIN products AS p ON p.id = o.product_id
GROUP BY c.id, c.name
ORDER BY total_spend DESC, c.name ASC
LIMIT 3

WITH customer_spend AS (
  SELECT c.id, c.name, COALESCE(SUM(o.quantity * p.price), 0) AS total_spend
  FROM customers c
  LEFT JOIN orders o ON o.customer_id = c.id
  LEFT JOIN products p ON p.id = o.product_id
  GROUP BY c.id, c.name
)
SELECT name
FROM customer_spend
WHERE total_spend > (SELECT AVG(total_spend) FROM customer_spend)

SELECT month,
       SUM(monthly_revenue) OVER (ORDER BY month) AS cumulative_revenue
FROM (
  SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', o.order_date) AS month,
         SUM(o.quantity * p.price) AS monthly_revenue
  FROM orders o
  JOIN products p ON o.product_id = p.id
  GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m', o.order_date)
) AS monthly_totals
ORDER BY month

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id)
FROM orders
WHERE product_id = (
  SELECT product_id
  FROM orders
  GROUP BY product_id
  ORDER BY SUM(quantity) DESC, product_id ASC
  LIMIT 1
)

SELECT r.name, COUNT(DISTINCT o.customer_id) AS customer_count
FROM regions r
LEFT JOIN customers c ON c.region_id = r.id
LEFT JOIN orders o ON o.customer_id = c.id
GROUP BY r.id, r.name
ORDER BY customer_count DESC, r.name

WITH revenue_by_region AS (
    SELECT
        r.name AS region_name,
        p.name AS product_name,
        SUM(o.quantity * p.price) AS total_revenue
    FROM orders o
    JOIN products p ON o.product_id = p.id
    JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.id
    JOIN regions r ON c.region_id = r.id
    GROUP BY r.id, p.id
),
ranked AS (
    SELECT
        region_name,
        product_name,
        total_revenue,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY region_name ORDER BY total_revenue DESC) AS rn
    FROM revenue_by_region
)
SELECT region_name, product_name, total_revenue
FROM ranked
WHERE rn = 1

SELECT c.name
FROM customers c
JOIN orders o ON c.id = o.customer_id
GROUP BY c.id, c.name
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT strftime('%Y-%m', o.order_date)) >= 4

WITH product_rev AS (
  SELECT p.id, p.name, SUM(o.quantity * p.price) AS total_rev
  FROM products p
  JOIN orders o ON p.id = o.product_id
  GROUP BY p.id, p.name
)
SELECT name
FROM product_rev
WHERE total_rev > (SELECT AVG(total_rev) FROM product_rev)

SELECT 
    p.category,
    ROUND(100.0 * SUM(o.quantity * p.price) / (SELECT SUM(o2.quantity * p2.price) FROM orders o2 JOIN products p2 ON o2.product_id = p2.id), 1) AS percentage
FROM orders o
JOIN products p ON o.product_id = p.id
GROUP BY p.category

SELECT c.name
FROM customers c
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM orders o
    JOIN products p ON o.product_id = p.id
    WHERE o.customer_id = c.id AND p.category = 'Electronics'
)

SELECT category, name
FROM (
    SELECT category, name,
           ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY category ORDER BY price DESC) AS rn
    FROM products
) ranked
WHERE rn = 2

SELECT r.name AS region, ROUND(AVG(o.quantity * p.price), 2) AS avg_order_value
FROM orders o
JOIN products p ON o.product_id = p.id
JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.id
JOIN regions r ON c.region_id = r.id
GROUP BY r.id, r.name
ORDER BY avg_order_value DESC
LIMIT 1

SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', o.order_date) AS month, SUM(o.quantity * p.price) AS total_revenue
FROM orders o
JOIN products p ON o.product_id = p.id
GROUP BY month
ORDER BY month

SELECT p.name
FROM products p
JOIN orders o ON p.id = o.product_id
JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.id
GROUP BY p.id, p.name
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT c.region_id) > 1

SELECT c.name, SUM(o.quantity * p.price) AS total_spend
FROM customers c
JOIN orders o ON c.id = o.customer_id
JOIN products p ON o.product_id = p.id
GROUP BY c.id, c.name
ORDER BY total_spend DESC
LIMIT 3

SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', o.order_date) AS month,
       SUM(SUM(o.quantity * p.price)) OVER (ORDER BY strftime('%Y-%m', o.order_date)) AS cumulative_revenue
FROM orders o
JOIN products p ON o.product_id = p.id
GROUP BY month
ORDER BY month

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id)
FROM orders
WHERE product_id = (
    SELECT product_id
    FROM orders
    GROUP BY product_id
    ORDER BY SUM(quantity) DESC
    LIMIT 1
)

SELECT r.name, COUNT(DISTINCT c.id) AS cnt
FROM customers c
JOIN orders o ON c.id = o.customer_id
JOIN regions r ON c.region_id = r.id
GROUP BY r.name
ORDER BY cnt DESC

SELECT 
    regions.name AS region_name,
    products.name AS product_name,
    MAX(total_revenue) AS revenue
FROM (
    SELECT 
        regions.id AS region_id,
        products.id AS product_id,
        SUM(orders.quantity * products.price) AS total_revenue
    FROM orders
    INNER JOIN customers ON orders.customer_id = customers.id
    INNER JOIN products ON orders.product_id = products.id
    INNER JOIN regions ON customers.region_id = regions.id
    GROUP BY regions.id, products.id
) AS revenue_data
INNER JOIN regions ON revenue_data.region_id = regions.id
INNER JOIN products ON revenue_data.product_id = products.id
GROUP BY regions.name

SELECT c.name 
FROM customers c 
JOIN orders o ON c.id = o.customer_id
WHERE (
  SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT SUBSTR(order_date, 1, 7)) 
  FROM orders 
  WHERE customer_id = c.id
) >= 4

SELECT p.id, p.name
FROM products p
JOIN (
  SELECT o.product_id, SUM(o.quantity * p.price) AS revenue
  FROM orders o
  JOIN products p ON p.id = o.product_id
  GROUP BY o.product_id
) subq ON p.id = subq.product_id
WHERE subq.revenue > (
  SELECT AVG(revenue)
  FROM (
    SELECT SUM(o.quantity * p.price) AS revenue
    FROM orders o
    JOIN products p ON p.id = o.product_id
    GROUP BY o.product_id
  )
)

SELECT 
  products.category,
  ROUND(SUM(orders.quantity * products.price) / (SELECT SUM(orders.quantity * products.price) FROM orders JOIN products ON orders.product_id = products.id) * 100, 1) AS percentage
FROM 
  orders
JOIN 
  products ON orders.product_id = products.id
GROUP BY 
  products.category

SELECT name 
FROM customers 
WHERE id NOT IN (
  SELECT customer_id 
  FROM orders 
  JOIN products ON orders.product_id = products.id 
  WHERE category = 'Electronics'
)

SELECT p1.category, p1.name AS product_name
FROM products p1
WHERE p1.price = (
    SELECT MAX(p2.price)
    FROM products p2
    WHERE p2.category = p1.category AND p2.price < (
        SELECT MAX(p3.price)
        FROM products p3
        WHERE p3.category = p1.category
    )
)

SELECT r.name AS region_name, ROUND(AVG(p.price * o.quantity), 2) AS average_order_value
FROM orders o
JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.id
JOIN regions r ON c.region_id = r.id
JOIN products p ON o.product_id = p.id
GROUP BY r.id
ORDER BY average_order_value DESC
LIMIT 1

SELECT 
    strftime('%Y-%m', order_date) AS month, 
    SUM(products.price * orders.quantity) AS total_revenue
FROM 
    orders
JOIN 
    products ON orders.product_id = products.id
GROUP BY 
    strftime('%Y-%m', order_date)
ORDER BY 
    month

SELECT p.name 
FROM products p 
JOIN orders o ON p.id = o.product_id 
JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.id
GROUP BY p.id 
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT c.region_id) > 1

SELECT c.name, SUM(o.quantity * p.price) AS total_spend
FROM customers c
JOIN orders o ON c.id = o.customer_id
JOIN products p ON o.product_id = p.id
GROUP BY c.id
ORDER BY total_spend DESC
LIMIT 3

SELECT c.name 
FROM customers c
JOIN orders o ON c.id = o.customer_id
JOIN products p ON o.product_id = p.id
GROUP BY c.id
HAVING SUM(p.price * o.quantity) > (
    SELECT AVG(total_spent) 
    FROM (
        SELECT SUM(p.price * o.quantity) AS total_spent 
        FROM customers c
        JOIN orders o ON c.id = o.customer_id
        JOIN products p ON o.product_id = p.id
        GROUP BY c.id
    )
)

SELECT 
    strftime('%Y-%m', order_date) AS month,
    SUM(SUM(products.price * orders.quantity)) OVER (ORDER BY strftime('%Y-%m', order_date)) AS cumulative_revenue
FROM 
    orders
JOIN 
    products ON orders.product_id = products.id
GROUP BY 
    strftime('%Y-%m', order_date)
ORDER BY 
    month

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT o.customer_id) 
FROM orders o
JOIN (
    SELECT product_id, SUM(quantity) AS total_quantity
    FROM orders
    GROUP BY product_id
    ORDER BY total_quantity DESC
    LIMIT 1
) best_selling_product ON o.product_id = best_selling_product.product_id

SELECT r.name, COUNT(DISTINCT c.id) AS customer_count
FROM regions r 
JOIN customers c ON r.id = c.region_id 
JOIN orders o ON c.id = o.customer_id 
GROUP BY r.id 
ORDER BY customer_count DESC

SELECT r.name AS region_name, p.name AS product_name, SUM(o.quantity * p.price) AS revenue
FROM regions r
JOIN customers c ON r.id = c.region_id
JOIN orders o ON c.id = o.customer_id
JOIN products p ON o.product_id = p.id
GROUP BY r.name, p.name
ORDER BY r.name, revenue DESC
LIMIT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM regions) * 1
SELECT c.name FROM customers c JOIN orders o ON c.id = o.customer_id GROUP BY c.id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT strftime('%m', o.order_date)) >= 4

SELECT p.name
FROM products p
JOIN orders o ON p.id = o.product_id
GROUP BY p.id
HAVING SUM(o.quantity * p.price) > (
    SELECT AVG(product_revenue)
    FROM (
        SELECT SUM(o2.quantity * p2.price) AS product_revenue
        FROM orders o2
        JOIN products p2 ON o2.product_id = p2.id
        GROUP BY p2.id
    )
)

SELECT p.category, ROUND(SUM(p.price * o.quantity) * 100.0 / (SELECT SUM(p.price * o.quantity) FROM orders o JOIN products p ON o.product_id = p.id), 1) AS percentage FROM orders o JOIN products p ON o.product_id = p.id GROUP BY p.category

SELECT t1.category, t1.name
FROM products t1
WHERE (
    SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT t2.price)
    FROM products t2
    WHERE t2.category = t1.category AND t2.price > t1.price
) = 1
ORDER BY t1.category, t1.price DESC

SELECT r.name, ROUND(AVG(o.quantity * p.price), 2) FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.id JOIN regions r ON c.region_id = r.id JOIN products p ON o.product_id = p.id GROUP BY r.id ORDER BY AVG(o.quantity * p.price) DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', order_date) AS month, SUM(orders.quantity * products.price) AS total_revenue FROM orders JOIN products ON orders.product_id = products.id GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m', order_date) ORDER BY month
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id) FROM orders WHERE product_id = (SELECT product_id FROM orders GROUP BY product_id ORDER BY SUM(quantity) DESC LIMIT 1)
SELECT r.name, COUNT(DISTINCT c.id) FROM regions r JOIN customers c ON r.id = c.region_id JOIN orders o ON c.id = o.customer_id GROUP BY r.name ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT c.id) DESC

SELECT r.name, p.name, SUM(o.quantity * p.price) AS revenue FROM orders o INNER JOIN products p ON o.product_id = p.id INNER JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.id INNER JOIN regions r ON c.region_id = r.id GROUP BY r.name, p.name ORDER BY revenue DESC
SELECT DISTINCT T1.name FROM customers AS T1 INNER JOIN orders AS T

SELECT p.name FROM products p JOIN ( SELECT product_id, SUM(quantity * price) AS total_revenue FROM orders GROUP BY product_id ) o ON p.id = o.product_id WHERE o.total_revenue > ( SELECT AVG(total_revenue) FROM ( SELECT product_id, SUM(quantity * price) AS total_revenue FROM orders GROUP BY product_id ) )
SELECT ROUND(SUM(p.price * o.quantity) / SUM(p.price * o.quantity) OVER (), 1) AS percentage FROM orders o JOIN products p ON o.product_id = p.id GROUP BY p.category
SELECT c.name FROM customers c WHERE c.id NOT IN (SELECT o.customer_id FROM orders o WHERE o.product_id IN (SELECT id FROM products WHERE category = 'Electronics'))
SELECT T1.category, T1.name FROM products AS T1 INNER JOIN ( SELECT category, MIN(price) AS min_price FROM products GROUP BY category ORDER BY min_price DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET
SELECT R.name, ROUND(AVG(O.price * O.quantity), 2) FROM orders O INNER JOIN customers C ON O.customer_id = C.id INNER JOIN regions R ON C.region_id = R.id GROUP BY R.name

SELECT SUM(o.quantity * p.price) AS revenue, EXTRACT(YEAR FROM o.order_date) || '-' || EXTRACT(MONTH FROM o.order_date) AS month FROM orders o JOIN products p ON o.product_id = p.id GROUP BY EXTRACT(YEAR FROM o.order_date) || '-' || EXTRACT(MONTH FROM o.order_date) ORDER BY o.order_date
SELECT T1.name FROM products AS T1 INNER JOIN orders AS T

SELECT name, SUM(o.quantity * p.price) AS total_spend 
FROM customers c 
JOIN orders o ON c.id = o.customer_id 
JOIN products p ON o.product_id = p.id 
GROUP BY c.name 
ORDER BY total_spend DESC LIMIT 3
SELECT name FROM customers WHERE SUM(orders.quantity * products.price) > (SELECT AVG(SUM(orders.quantity * products.price)) FROM customers)

SELECT EXTRACT(MONTH FROM order_date) AS month, SUM(o.quantity * p.price) AS cumulative_revenue FROM orders o JOIN products p ON o.product_id = p.id GROUP BY EXTRACT(MONTH FROM order_date) ORDER BY EXTRACT(YEAR FROM order_date)
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT c.id) FROM customers c JOIN orders o ON c.id = o.customer_id JOIN products p ON o.product_id = p.id WHERE o.quantity = ( SELECT MAX(quantity) FROM orders )

SELECT T2.name, COUNT(DISTINCT T1.customer_id) AS customer_count 
FROM orders T1 
JOIN customers T2 ON T1.customer_id = T2.id 
JOIN regions T3 ON T2.region_id = T3.id 
GROUP BY T3.name 
ORDER BY customer_count DESC
